requirement_topic.en: Inverter Electrical Safety — AS/NZS 62109-1 & AS/NZS 62109-2 (Grid-Tied PV Inverters, Storage Excluded)
requirement_topic.zh: 逆变器电气安全——AS/NZS 62109-1及AS/NZS 62109-2（并网光伏逆变器，不含储能）
requirement_topic.zht: 逆變器電氣安全——AS/NZS 62109-1及AS/NZS 62109-2（並網光伏逆變器，不含儲能）

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters supplied in Australia must comply with AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 (Safety of power converters for use in PV power systems — General requirements) and AS/NZS 62109.2:2026 (Particular requirements for inverters), both published 30 January 2026. These supersede the 2011 editions and are modified adoptions of IEC 62109-1:2010 Ed. 1.0 and IEC 62109-2:2011 Ed. 1.0 respectively with Australian/New Zealand national deviations. These are the mandatory safety standards under the Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) for this product category. Testing must be performed by a body accredited by ILAC-MRA signatories (e.g. NATA-accredited labs in Australia, or overseas labs accredited by a recognised accreditation body, including JAS-ANZ accredited certifiers for EESS Level 3 Certificate of Conformity). Storage-integrated inverters and battery systems are subject to additional or different standards and are out of scope here.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚供应的并网光伏逆变器须符合AS/NZS 62109.1:2026（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——通用要求）和AS/NZS 62109.2:2026（逆变器专项要求），两项标准均于2026年1月30日发布，取代2011年版本，为IEC 62109-1:2010第1版和IEC 62109-2:2011第1版的修改采纳版本，附带澳大利亚/新西兰国家偏差条款。这两项标准是电气设备安全系统（EESS）针对该产品类别列明的强制性安全标准。测试须由ILAC-MRA签约机构认可的实验室承担（如澳大利亚NATA认可实验室，或经认可认证机构认可的境外实验室，包括EESS三级合规证书所需的JAS-ANZ认可认证机构）。含储能的逆变器及电池系统须遵循额外或不同的标准，不在本文范围之内。
summary.zht: 在澳大利亞供應的並網光伏逆變器須符合AS/NZS 62109.1:2026（光伏電力系統用功率變換器安全——通用要求）和AS/NZS 62109.2:2026（逆變器專項要求），兩項標準均於2026年1月30日發布，取代2011年版本，為IEC 62109-1:2010第1版和IEC 62109-2:2011第1版的修改採納版本，附帶澳大利亞/新西蘭國家偏差條款。這兩項標準是電氣設備安全系統（EESS）針對該產品類別列明的強制性安全標準。測試須由ILAC-MRA簽約機構認可的實驗室承擔（如澳大利亞NATA認可實驗室，或經認可認證機構認可的境外實驗室，包括EESS三級合規證書所需的JAS-ANZ認可認證機構）。含儲能的逆變器及電池系統須遵循額外或不同的標準，不在本文範圍之內。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems: General requirements (published 30 January 2026, supersedes 2011 edition)
AS/NZS 62109.2:2026 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems: Particular requirements for inverters (published 30 January 2026, supersedes 2011 edition)
Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) — mandatory registration and compliance framework (eess.gov.au)

summary.en: The primary Chinese national standard for grid-connected PV inverters is GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical requirements for photovoltaic grid-connected inverters — recommended/voluntary). Chinese manufacturers exporting globally commonly hold CB Scheme test certificates issued under IEC 62109-1/-2 by an IECEE-recognised National Certification Body (NCB). Because AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 and AS/NZS 62109.2:2026 are modified adoptions of IEC 62109-1:2010 and IEC 62109-2:2011 respectively (same IEC base text, with Australian/NZ national deviations), a CB test report to IEC 62109-1/-2 from an ILAC-MRA-accredited laboratory forms a strong technical foundation — but the CB certificate alone does not satisfy EESS registration obligations (see row aupv-safety-002), and national deviation delta testing may be required. GB/T 37408-2019 itself is voluntary and does not substitute for AS/NZS 62109 compliance evidence. Grid-tied PV inverters are not within the scope of China's CCC (China Compulsory Certification) mandatory certification catalogue as of June 2026.
summary.zh: 中国针对并网光伏逆变器的主要国家标准为GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求——推荐性/自愿执行）。面向全球市场出口的中国制造商通常通过IECEE认可的国家认证机构（NCB）持有依据IEC 62109-1/-2签发的CB认证报告。由于AS/NZS 62109.1:2026和AS/NZS 62109.2:2026分别为IEC 62109-1:2010和IEC 62109-2:2011的修改采纳版本（IEC基础文本相同，附澳大利亚/新西兰国家偏差），来自ILAC-MRA认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB测试报告提供了坚实的技术基础——但CB证书本身不满足EESS注册义务（见第aupv-safety-002行），且可能需要进行国家偏差增量测试。GB/T 37408-2019本身为自愿执行，不能替代AS/NZS 62109合规证明。截至2026年6月，并网光伏逆变器不在中国强制性产品认证（CCC）强制认证目录范围内。
summary.zht: 中國針對並網光伏逆變器的主要國家標準為GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求——推薦性/自願執行）。面向全球市場出口的中國製造商通常通過IECEE認可的國家認證機構（NCB）持有依據IEC 62109-1/-2簽發的CB認證報告。由於AS/NZS 62109.1:2026和AS/NZS 62109.2:2026分別為IEC 62109-1:2010和IEC 62109-2:2011的修改採納版本（IEC基礎文本相同，附澳大利亞/新西蘭國家偏差），來自ILAC-MRA認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB測試報告提供了堅實的技術基礎——但CB證書本身不滿足EESS注冊義務（見第aupv-safety-002行），且可能需要進行國家偏差增量測試。GB/T 37408-2019本身為自願執行，不能替代AS/NZS 62109合規證明。截至2026年6月，並網光伏逆變器不在中國強制性產品認證（CCC）強制認證目錄範圍內。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — Technical requirements for photovoltaic grid-connected inverters (recommended national standard)
IEC 62109-1:2010 / IEC 62109-2:2011 via IECEE CB Scheme — international safety certificates held by major CN inverter manufacturers

gap.en: The technical gap is narrow: AS/NZS 62109-1/-2 are technically equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2, so CN manufacturers with valid IEC 62109-1/-2 CB test reports from ILAC-MRA-accredited laboratories have strong alignment. Key gaps are: (1) National deviations in AS/NZS 62109-1/-2 must be verified and any delta testing completed — these deviations are documented in the published standards; (2) The CB test report scope must cover all applicable clauses of the AS/NZS versions, not just the IEC base text; (3) Compliance evidence must be submitted as part of EESS Responsible Supplier registration and RCM marking (see rows aupv-safety-002 and aupv-safety-003) — holding a CB certificate does not by itself register a product in Australia. GB/T 37408-2019 voluntary conformity alone is insufficient for the Australian market.
gap.zh: 技术差距较小：AS/NZS 62109-1/-2在技术上等同于IEC 62109-1/-2，因此持有来自ILAC-MRA认可实验室的有效IEC 62109-1/-2 CB测试报告的中国制造商在技术上高度契合。主要差距为：（1）须核实AS/NZS 62109-1/-2中的国家偏差条款，并完成任何增量测试——这些偏差记录于已发布的标准中；（2）CB测试报告覆盖范围须包含AS/NZS版本的所有适用条款，而不仅限于IEC基础文本；（3）合规证明须作为EESS责任供应商注册及RCM标志申请的一部分提交（见第aupv-safety-002和aupv-safety-003行）——仅持有CB证书不构成产品在澳大利亚的注册。仅凭GB/T 37408-2019自愿合规不足以满足澳大利亚市场要求。
gap.zht: 技術差距較小：AS/NZS 62109-1/-2在技術上等同於IEC 62109-1/-2，因此持有來自ILAC-MRA認可實驗室的有效IEC 62109-1/-2 CB測試報告的中國製造商在技術上高度契合。主要差距為：（1）須核實AS/NZS 62109-1/-2中的國家偏差條款，並完成任何增量測試——這些偏差記錄於已發布的標準中；（2）CB測試報告覆蓋範圍須包含AS/NZS版本的所有適用條款，而不僅限於IEC基礎文本；（3）合規證明須作為EESS責任供應商注冊及RCM標誌申請的一部分提交（見第aupv-safety-002和aupv-safety-003行）——僅持有CB證書不構成產品在澳大利亞的注冊。僅憑GB/T 37408-2019自願合規不足以滿足澳大利亞市場要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 and AS/NZS 62109.2:2026 are the prescribed safety standards under EESS for grid-tied PV inverters; compliance is a precondition for EESS Level 3 Certificate of Conformity and RCM marking
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended (T) national standard; CCC mandatory certification does not apply to grid-tied PV inverters (confirmed as of June 2026)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. CN-manufactured grid-tied PV inverters with IEC 62109-1/-2 CB test reports from ILAC-MRA-accredited laboratories are well-positioned technically for AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 / AS/NZS 62109.2:2026 compliance (same IEC base text, national deviations apply). However, the CB certificate alone does not satisfy Australian market obligations — EESS Level 3 Certificate of Conformity from a JAS-ANZ-accredited certifier, Responsible Supplier registration, and RCM marking are also required (see rows aupv-safety-002 and aupv-safety-003). AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 and AS/NZS 62109.2:2026 published 30 January 2026 replace the 2011 editions; verify national deviation requirements apply at time of testing. This is not legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。持有来自ILAC-MRA认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB测试报告的中国制造并网光伏逆变器，在技术上具备符合AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 / AS/NZS 62109.2:2026的良好基础（IEC基础文本相同，须核实国家偏差条款）。但CB证书本身不满足澳大利亚市场义务——还须由JAS-ANZ认可的认证机构颁发EESS三级合规证书，完成责任供应商注册和RCM标志标注（见第aupv-safety-002和aupv-safety-003行）。AS/NZS 62109.1:2026和AS/NZS 62109.2:2026于2026年1月30日发布，取代2011年版本；须确认测试时适用的国家偏差要求。本内容不构成法律意见。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。持有來自ILAC-MRA認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB測試報告的中國製造並網光伏逆變器，在技術上具備符合AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 / AS/NZS 62109.2:2026的良好基礎（IEC基礎文本相同，須核實國家偏差條款）。但CB證書本身不滿足澳大利亞市場義務——還須由JAS-ANZ認可的認證機構頒發EESS三級合規證書，完成責任供應商注冊和RCM標誌標注（見第aupv-safety-002和aupv-safety-003行）。AS/NZS 62109.1:2026和AS/NZS 62109.2:2026於2026年1月30日發布，取代2011年版本；須確認測試時適用的國家偏差要求。本內容不構成法律意見。

requirement_topic.en: RCM (Regulatory Compliance Mark) — Mandatory Conformity Marking for PV Inverters in Australia
requirement_topic.zh: RCM（法规合规标志）——澳大利亚光伏逆变器强制性合规标志
requirement_topic.zht: RCM（法規合規標誌）——澳大利亞光伏逆變器強制性合規標誌

summary.en: The Regulatory Compliance Mark (RCM) is the mandatory conformity marking for electrical equipment (including grid-tied PV inverters) placed on the Australian and New Zealand market. RCM combines the former A-tick (electromagnetic compatibility) and C-tick (electrical safety) marks into a single symbol. To affix RCM, a Responsible Supplier must: (1) obtain a Certificate of Conformity from a JAS-ANZ-accredited certifier to the applicable safety standards (AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 and AS/NZS 62109.2:2026 for safety; AS CISPR 11:2024 for EMC emissions) for Level 3 equipment; (2) register as a Responsible Supplier in the EESS database at eess.gov.au (the EESS Platform replaced the old erac.gov.au system in October 2024); (3) register the equipment model in the EESS register; (4) affix the RCM symbol to the product. ACMA has not issued any PV-inverter-specific RCM guidance updates beyond the general EESS and ACMA frameworks current as at June 2026.
summary.zh: 法规合规标志（RCM）是澳大利亚和新西兰市场投放电气设备（包括并网光伏逆变器）的强制性合规标志。RCM将原有的A-tick（电磁兼容）和C-tick（电气安全）标志合并为单一符号。贴附RCM标志须满足以下条件：（1）由JAS-ANZ认可的认证机构针对三级设备颁发适用安全标准（安全方面为AS/NZS 62109.1:2026和AS/NZS 62109.2:2026；EMC发射方面为AS CISPR 11:2024）的合规证书；（2）在eess.gov.au的EESS数据库中注册为责任供应商（EESS平台于2024年10月取代原erac.gov.au系统）；（3）在EESS登记册中登记设备型号；（4）在产品上标注RCM符号。截至2026年6月，ACMA未发布现行EESS和ACMA框架以外的光伏逆变器专项RCM指引更新。
summary.zht: 法規合規標誌（RCM）是澳大利亞和新西蘭市場投放電氣設備（包括並網光伏逆變器）的強制性合規標誌。RCM將原有的A-tick（電磁兼容）和C-tick（電氣安全）標誌合併為單一符號。貼附RCM標誌須滿足以下條件：（1）由JAS-ANZ認可的認證機構針對三級設備頒發適用安全標準（安全方面為AS/NZS 62109.1:2026和AS/NZS 62109.2:2026；EMC發射方面為AS CISPR 11:2024）的合規證書；（2）在eess.gov.au的EESS數據庫中登記為責任供應商（EESS平台於2024年10月取代原erac.gov.au系統）；（3）在EESS登記冊中登記設備型號；（4）在產品上標注RCM符號。截至2026年6月，ACMA未發布現行EESS和ACMA框架以外的光伏逆變器專項RCM指引更新。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) — mandatory registration and RCM marking framework (eess.gov.au; EESS Platform launched October 2024)
Australian Communications and Media Authority (ACMA) — RCM administration for EMC component
AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 / AS/NZS 62109.2:2026 — safety standards underpinning RCM compliance for PV inverters (published 30 January 2026, supersede 2011 editions)

summary.en: China has no domestic equivalent to RCM. The closest conceptual parallel is the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) mark, but CCC does not apply to grid-tied PV inverters for export (and is a domestic-market import/sale mark, not an export obligation). Chinese manufacturers exporting to Australia must obtain RCM compliance through the EESS Responsible Supplier process — there is no mutual recognition agreement between China and Australia that automatically converts any Chinese certification into RCM eligibility. CB test reports and IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates from IECEE NCBs are widely accepted as compliance evidence supporting RCM, but the EESS registration step is still required in Australia.
summary.zh: 中国国内没有与RCM相当的标志。概念上最接近的是强制性产品认证（CCC）标志，但CCC不适用于出口用并网光伏逆变器（且CCC是国内市场进口/销售标志，而非出口义务）。出口澳大利亚的中国制造商须通过EESS责任供应商流程取得RCM合规资质——中澳之间不存在能将任何中国认证自动转换为RCM资格的相互认可协议。IECEE NCB签发的CB测试报告和IEC 62109-1/-2证书被广泛作为支持RCM的合规证明，但EESS注册步骤仍须在澳大利亚完成。
summary.zht: 中國國內沒有與RCM相當的標誌。概念上最接近的是強制性產品認證（CCC）標誌，但CCC不適用於出口用並網光伏逆變器（且CCC是國內市場進口/銷售標誌，而非出口義務）。出口澳大利亞的中國製造商須通過EESS責任供應商流程取得RCM合規資質——中澳之間不存在能將任何中國認證自動轉換為RCM資格的相互認可協議。IECEE NCB簽發的CB測試報告和IEC 62109-1/-2證書被廣泛作為支持RCM的合規證明，但EESS注冊步驟仍須在澳大利亞完成。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — domestic CN market mark; does not apply to grid-tied PV inverters (confirmed as of June 2026)
IECEE CB Scheme — international safety certificates that can support EESS compliance evidence but do not substitute for EESS registration

gap.en: The RCM / EESS registration gap is the primary procedural barrier for CN exporters entering Australia. No Chinese domestic certification or mark satisfies RCM obligations. The required steps are: (1) obtain a Certificate of Conformity to AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 and AS/NZS 62109.2:2026 from a JAS-ANZ-accredited certifier (CB test reports to IEC 62109-1/-2 from ILAC-MRA-accredited labs provide the technical basis but delta testing for AS/NZS national deviations may be required); (2) register as a Responsible Supplier on the EESS portal at eess.gov.au — requires an Australian Business Number (ABN) or an Australian-based importer/agent acting as Responsible Supplier; (3) register each inverter model in the EESS equipment register; (4) affix RCM mark to product and packaging. The Responsible Supplier must be an entity with an Australian presence — a Chinese manufacturer without an Australian entity must engage an Australian importer or agent to act as Responsible Supplier. This is analogous to the UK authorised representative obligation.
gap.zh: RCM/EESS注册差距是中国出口商进入澳大利亚市场的主要程序性壁垒。中国国内任何认证或标志均不满足RCM义务。所需步骤为：（1）由JAS-ANZ认可的认证机构颁发符合AS/NZS 62109.1:2026和AS/NZS 62109.2:2026的合规证书（来自ILAC-MRA认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB测试报告提供技术基础，但可能需要进行AS/NZS国家偏差增量测试）；（2）在EESS门户（eess.gov.au）注册为责任供应商——需要澳大利亚商业号码（ABN）或由澳大利亚境内的进口商/代理商担任责任供应商；（3）在EESS设备登记册中登记每款逆变器型号；（4）在产品和包装上标注RCM标志。责任供应商须为在澳大利亚有存在的实体——没有澳大利亚实体的中国制造商须委托澳大利亚进口商或代理商担任责任供应商。这与英国授权代表义务类似。
gap.zht: RCM/EESS注冊差距是中國出口商進入澳大利亞市場的主要程序性壁壘。中國國內任何認證或標誌均不滿足RCM義務。所需步驟為：（1）由JAS-ANZ認可的認證機構頒發符合AS/NZS 62109.1:2026和AS/NZS 62109.2:2026的合規證書（來自ILAC-MRA認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB測試報告提供技術基礎，但可能需要進行AS/NZS國家偏差增量測試）；（2）在EESS門戶（eess.gov.au）注冊為責任供應商——需要澳大利亞商業號碼（ABN）或由澳大利亞境內的進口商/代理商擔任責任供應商；（3）在EESS設備登記冊中登記每款逆變器型號；（4）在產品和包裝上標注RCM標誌。責任供應商須為在澳大利亞有存在的實體——沒有澳大利亞實體的中國製造商須委託澳大利亞進口商或代理商擔任責任供應商。這與英國授權代表義務類似。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RCM marking and EESS Responsible Supplier registration are legal requirements for grid-tied PV inverters supplied in Australia
mandatory_status.cn: N/A — RCM is an Australian export-market obligation; no domestic CN equivalent for grid-tied PV inverters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. RCM marking backed by EESS Responsible Supplier registration is the mandatory gateway for CN-manufactured grid-tied PV inverters entering the Australian market. No Chinese domestic certification substitutes for this obligation. CN exporters without an Australian Business Number must engage an Australian-based importer or agent to register as Responsible Supplier. CB test reports to IEC 62109-1/-2 from ILAC-MRA-accredited laboratories are a widely accepted foundation for compliance evidence but must be supplemented with AS/NZS deviation verification and formal EESS registration. This is not legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。以EESS责任供应商注册为支撑的RCM标志是中国制造并网光伏逆变器进入澳大利亚市场的强制性门槛。任何中国国内认证均不能替代此义务。没有澳大利亚商业号码的中国出口商须委托澳大利亚境内的进口商或代理商注册为责任供应商。来自ILAC-MRA认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB测试报告是广泛认可的合规证明基础，但须辅以AS/NZS偏差核实和正式EESS注册。本内容不构成法律意见。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。以EESS責任供應商注冊為支撐的RCM標誌是中國製造並網光伏逆變器進入澳大利亞市場的強制性門檻。任何中國國內認證均不能替代此義務。沒有澳大利亞商業號碼的中國出口商須委託澳大利亞境內的進口商或代理商注冊為責任供應商。來自ILAC-MRA認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB測試報告是廣泛認可的合規證明基礎，但須輔以AS/NZS偏差核實和正式EESS注冊。本內容不構成法律意見。

requirement_topic.en: EESS Responsible Supplier Registration — Australian Market Access Obligation for Non-AU Manufacturers (Grid-Tied PV Inverters)
requirement_topic.zh: EESS责任供应商注册——非澳大利亚制造商进入澳大利亚市场的义务（并网光伏逆变器）
requirement_topic.zht: EESS責任供應商注冊——非澳大利亞製造商進入澳大利亞市場的義務（並網光伏逆變器）

summary.en: The Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS), administered by the Electrical Regulatory Authorities Council (ERAC) and state/territory regulators, requires that any business supplying in-scope electrical equipment (including grid-tied PV inverters) in Australia must register as a Responsible Supplier on the national EESS database (eess.gov.au — the EESS Platform replaced the old erac.gov.au system in October 2024). The Responsible Supplier must: (a) hold and maintain a Certificate of Conformity to the applicable safety standards (AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 and AS/NZS 62109.2:2026, published 30 January 2026); (b) register each equipment model in the EESS register with model details and evidence references; (c) ensure the product bears the RCM mark (see row aupv-safety-002); (d) maintain records and make them available to state/territory electrical safety regulators on request. The Responsible Supplier must have an Australian Business Number (ABN). A non-Australian manufacturer without an ABN must appoint an Australian-based importer, distributor, or agent holding an ABN to act as Responsible Supplier. The EESS register is publicly searchable at eess.gov.au. Registration periods of 1, 2, or 5 years are available for Level 3 equipment. No amendments to EESS rules specifically affecting PV inverter registration were made in 2025/2026 beyond the general EESS Platform migration.
summary.zh: 由电气监管机构委员会（ERAC）及州/领地监管机构管理的电气设备安全系统（EESS）要求，任何在澳大利亚供应纳管范围内电气设备（包括并网光伏逆变器）的企业，均须在全国EESS数据库（eess.gov.au——EESS平台于2024年10月取代原erac.gov.au系统）注册为责任供应商。责任供应商须：（a）持有并维护符合适用安全标准（AS/NZS 62109.1:2026和AS/NZS 62109.2:2026，于2026年1月30日发布）的合规证书；（b）在EESS登记册中登记每款设备型号，注明型号详情及证明材料引用；（c）确保产品标注RCM标志（见第aupv-safety-002行）；（d）保存记录并在州/领地电气安全监管机构要求时予以提供。责任供应商须持有澳大利亚商业号码（ABN）。没有ABN的非澳大利亚制造商须委托持有ABN的澳大利亚境内进口商、分销商或代理商担任责任供应商。EESS登记册可在eess.gov.au公开查询。三级设备可选择1年、2年或5年注册期限。2025/2026年未有专门影响光伏逆变器注册要求的EESS规则修订（EESS平台迁移除外）。
summary.zht: 由電氣監管機構委員會（ERAC）及州/領地監管機構管理的電氣設備安全系統（EESS）要求，任何在澳大利亞供應納管範圍內電氣設備（包括並網光伏逆變器）的企業，均須在全國EESS數據庫（eess.gov.au——EESS平台於2024年10月取代原erac.gov.au系統）注冊為責任供應商。責任供應商須：（a）持有並維護符合適用安全標準（AS/NZS 62109.1:2026和AS/NZS 62109.2:2026，於2026年1月30日發布）的合規證書；（b）在EESS登記冊中登記每款設備型號，注明型號詳情及證明材料引用；（c）確保產品標注RCM標誌（見第aupv-safety-002行）；（d）保存記錄並在州/領地電氣安全監管機構要求時予以提供。責任供應商須持有澳大利亞商業號碼（ABN）。沒有ABN的非澳大利亞製造商須委託持有ABN的澳大利亞境內進口商、分銷商或代理商擔任責任供應商。EESS登記冊可在eess.gov.au公開查詢。三級設備可選擇1年、2年或5年注冊期限。2025/2026年未有專門影響光伏逆變器注冊要求的EESS規則修訂（EESS平台遷移除外）。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) — national registration framework administered by ERAC (eess.gov.au; EESS Platform replaced erac.gov.au in October 2024)

State and territory electrical safety legislation (e.g. Electrical Safety Act 2002 (Qld), Electricity Safety Act 1998 (Vic), Electricity (Consumer Safety) Act 2004 (NSW)) — EESS underpins compliance with these laws
AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 / AS/NZS 62109.2:2026 — safety standards required as compliance evidence (published 30 January 2026)

summary.en: China has no domestic equivalent to the EESS Responsible Supplier registration obligation. The concept of a legally accountable domestic supplier/importer registering with a national safety authority before selling electrical products is not mirrored in Chinese export regulations. Chinese manufacturers exporting to Australia must engage an Australian-based importer or distributor with an ABN to fulfil the Responsible Supplier role, or establish their own Australian entity. Major CN inverter brands with established AU distribution networks (e.g. through Australian solar distributors) typically have an Australian Responsible Supplier already registered; smaller exporters or new entrants often do not. No CB certificate, GB/T standard compliance, or Chinese government export licence substitutes for EESS registration.
summary.zh: 中国国内没有与EESS责任供应商注册义务相当的要求。在向全国安全主管机构注册后方可销售电气产品的法定责任供应商/进口商概念，在中国出口法规中没有对应安排。出口澳大利亚的中国制造商须委托持有ABN的澳大利亚境内进口商或分销商承担责任供应商角色，或在澳大利亚设立自有实体。已在澳大利亚建立分销网络的主要中国逆变器品牌（如通过澳大利亚太阳能分销商）通常已有注册的澳大利亚责任供应商；规模较小的出口商或新进入者往往尚未落实。任何CB证书、GB/T标准合规证明或中国政府出口许可均不能替代EESS注册。
summary.zht: 中國國內沒有與EESS責任供應商注冊義務相當的要求。在向全國安全主管機構注冊後方可銷售電氣產品的法定責任供應商/進口商概念，在中國出口法規中沒有對應安排。出口澳大利亞的中國製造商須委託持有ABN的澳大利亞境內進口商或分銷商承擔責任供應商角色，或在澳大利亞設立自有實體。已在澳大利亞建立分銷網絡的主要中國逆變器品牌（如通過澳大利亞太陽能分銷商）通常已有注冊的澳大利亞責任供應商；規模較小的出口商或新進入者往往尚未落實。任何CB證書、GB/T標準合規證明或中國政府出口許可均不能替代EESS注冊。

standards_or_laws: No direct CN domestic equivalent — EESS registration is an Australian export-market obligation only
IECEE CB Scheme — international safety certificate that supports compliance evidence but does not substitute for EESS registration

gap.en: This is a structural gap: every CN manufacturer supplying grid-tied PV inverters in Australia must have an Australian-based Responsible Supplier (ABN holder) registered in the EESS database — no Chinese domestic process or certificate removes this requirement. The gap is administrative and commercial, not technical. Specific obligations: (1) identify or appoint an Australian-based entity with an ABN to act as Responsible Supplier; (2) obtain a Certificate of Conformity to AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 / AS/NZS 62109.2:2026 from a JAS-ANZ-accredited certifier; (3) complete EESS model registration for each inverter SKU at eess.gov.au; (4) affix RCM mark and maintain records. Failure to register is a regulatory offence under state/territory electrical safety legislation. This obligation is analogous to the UK Authorised Representative requirement under SI 2016/1101.
gap.zh: 这是一个结构性差距：每位在澳大利亚供应并网光伏逆变器的中国制造商，须在EESS数据库中注册一家持有ABN的澳大利亚境内责任供应商——任何中国国内流程或证书均不能免除此要求。该差距属于行政和商业层面，而非技术层面。具体义务：（1）确定或委托持有ABN的澳大利亚境内实体担任责任供应商；（2）由JAS-ANZ认可的认证机构颁发符合AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 / AS/NZS 62109.2:2026的合规证书；（3）在eess.gov.au为每款逆变器SKU完成EESS型号注册；（4）标注RCM标志并保存记录。未完成注册在州/领地电气安全法律下构成违规行为。此义务类似于英国SI 2016/1101下的授权代表要求。
gap.zht: 這是一個結構性差距：每位在澳大利亞供應並網光伏逆變器的中國製造商，須在EESS數據庫中注冊一家持有ABN的澳大利亞境內責任供應商——任何中國國內流程或證書均不能免除此要求。該差距屬於行政和商業層面，而非技術層面。具體義務：（1）確定或委託持有ABN的澳大利亞境內實體擔任責任供應商；（2）由JAS-ANZ認可的認證機構頒發符合AS/NZS 62109.1:2026 / AS/NZS 62109.2:2026的合規證書；（3）在eess.gov.au為每款逆變器SKU完成EESS型號注冊；（4）標注RCM標誌並保存記錄。未完成注冊在州/領地電氣安全法律下構成違規行為。此義務類似於英國SI 2016/1101下的授權代表要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EESS Responsible Supplier registration is a legal prerequisite for supplying grid-tied PV inverters in Australia; non-compliance is a regulatory offence under state/territory electrical safety legislation
mandatory_status.cn: N/A — no domestic CN equivalent; EESS registration is an Australian market-access obligation only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. EESS Responsible Supplier registration is a hard legal prerequisite for supplying CN-manufactured grid-tied PV inverters in Australia. It cannot be waived by holding a CB certificate, GB/T standard conformity declaration, or any Chinese government export document. CN manufacturers without an Australian ABN must appoint an Australian-based importer or distributor as Responsible Supplier before any product is supplied into the Australian market. The current EESS registration process and fee schedule are available at eess.gov.au (the EESS Platform replaced erac.gov.au in October 2024). This is not legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。EESS责任供应商注册是在澳大利亚供应中国制造并网光伏逆变器的强制性法律前提条件。持有CB证书、GB/T标准合规声明或任何中国政府出口文件均无法豁免此要求。没有澳大利亚ABN的中国制造商须在向澳大利亚市场供应任何产品前，委托澳大利亚境内的进口商或分销商担任责任供应商。当前EESS注册流程及收费标准可在eess.gov.au查阅（EESS平台于2024年10月取代原erac.gov.au）。本内容不构成法律意见。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。EESS責任供應商注冊是在澳大利亞供應中國製造並網光伏逆變器的強制性法律前提條件。持有CB證書、GB/T標準合規聲明或任何中國政府出口文件均無法豁免此要求。沒有澳大利亞ABN的中國製造商須在向澳大利亞市場供應任何產品前，委託澳大利亞境內的進口商或分銷商擔任責任供應商。當前EESS注冊流程及收費標準可在eess.gov.au查閱（EESS平台於2024年10月取代原erac.gov.au）。本內容不構成法律意見。
